blob.description: Reference to external JSON blob containing content (extended mode, used when content > 20KB)

items.description: Array of content blocks (inline mode, used when content ≤ 20KB)

references.description: Array of blob references (full objects) used in the content (required in extended mode to prevent garbage collection)

main.description: Hybrid content storage: inline for small content (≤20KB), blob for large content (>20KB)
